case_title: YASHOR KHAMIDOV VS. RANDY S SARMIENTO

docket_entries.description: SMALL CLAIMS CALENDAR OF JUN-28-2013 - TAKEN UNDER SUBMISSION AS OF JUN-28-2013 BY DONALD S. MITCHELL. APPEARANCE BY PLAINTIFF, ONLY. PLAINTIFF WAS ASSISTED BY TURKISH INTERPRETER---DZHAMAL CHAKHALIDZE. NO EXHIBITS RETAINED. JUDGE: DONALD S. MITCHELL. CLERK: P. NATT. NOT REPORTED. (506)

SMALL CLAIMS HEARING OF MAY-17-2013 - CONTINUED PER REQUEST OF PLAINTIFF TO JUN-28-2013 AT 10:00 AM IN DEPT. 506. "DEFENDANT'S VENUE CHALLENGE IS DENIED", PER JUDGE DONALD MITCHELL. APPEARANCE BY PLAINTIFF ONLY. PLAINTIFF WAS ASSISTED BY RUSSIAN/TURKISH INTERPRETER---BAKHTLI AMURKHNOBA. NO EXHIBITS RETAINED. JUDGE: DONALD S. MITCHELL. CLERK: M. GOODMAN. NOT REPORTED. (506)
SMALL CLAIMS HEARING OF JUN-28-2013 - JUDGMENT.

THE COURT HAS ORDERED THE FOLLOWING JUDGMENT ENTERED: IT IS ADJUDGED THAT PLAINTIFF KHAMIDOV, YASHOR RECOVER FROM DEFENDANT SARMIENTO, RANDY S $6,660.00 PRINCIPAL, $110.00 COSTS, TOTAL JUDGMENT $6,770.00 STAY OF EXECUTION 30 DAYS NO EXHIBITS FILED

ORDER ON REQUEST TO MAKE PAYMENTS THE REQUEST TO MAKE PAYMENTS IS APPROVED, AND THE COURT ORDERS: PAYMENTS OF $200.00 ON THE 16TH DAY OF EACH MONTH, STARTING OCTOBER 16, 2013 UNTIL JULY 16, 2016 AMOUNT OF FINAL PAYMENT $60.00 - DONALD S. MITCHELL
